title: Reading - Part 2
instructions: For questions 1–5, choose the correct text (A–F) for each person.

texts.title: Fitness Together
texts.text: Friendly trainers help teenagers improve their fitness through fun group classes. No experience is needed and everyone works at their own level.

texts.title: Central Library
texts.text: The library offers silent study rooms, free Wi‑Fi and computers. It stays open until 9 p.m. during the week.

texts.title: Stage Stars
texts.text: Young people can practise singing, acting and dancing before performing in local shows. Weekly rehearsals take place every Friday evening.

texts.title: City Art Club
texts.text: Students meet every Wednesday to learn painting and drawing techniques together. Beginners are welcome and there are regular social events after classes.

texts.title: Chess Corner
texts.text: A small club for students who enjoy strategy games and quiet indoor activities after school.

texts.title: Mountain Walkers
texts.text: This group organises hiking trips in the countryside every Saturday morning. Transport is included and members should enjoy physical activity outdoors.

questions.needs: wants to learn something creative after school and meet new people
questions.explanation: Emma matches option A because it best fits the description.

questions.needs: needs a quiet place to study with internet access
questions.explanation: Sofia matches option C because it best fits the description.

questions.needs: would like to improve his fitness in a friendly environment
questions.explanation: Daniel matches option D because it best fits the description.

questions.needs: is interested in music and performing in front of people
questions.explanation: Mia matches option E because it best fits the description.

questions.needs: is looking for outdoor activities at the weekend
questions.explanation: Leo matches option B because it best fits the description.
